name: Christian Menefee
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $63,500 for Christian Menefee in U.S. House, TX-18. This dataset currently classifies this as Pro-Israel when total funding is above $0; additional primary-source statement and vote evidence should continue to be expanded.

timeline.event: Track AIPAC congressional listing records Israel Lobby Total: $63,500.
